analysis_result: 19 MPNSTs (16 MPNST + 3 Low-Grade MPNST) in MOESM4 Clinical Data table
discrepancy_analysis: CONCORDANT: Reported result (19 MPNSTs) and model result (19 = 16 MPNST + 3 Low-Grade MPNST) are exactly equal (0% relative difference). Verified by loading MOESM4 'Clinical Data' sheet (108 rows) and tabulating the 'Tumor Type' column: MPNST=16, Low-Grade MPNST=3, Neurofibroma=35, Cutaneous_NF=33, Atypical_NF=21. The model correctly applied the paper's convention of combining MPNST and Low-Grade MPNST categories.
